children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses how her English teacher, Sister Sabina, turned her life around by getting her interested in reading, writing, and poetry.

citation: "Supportive Teachers," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4214/supportive-teachers, accessed May 08, 2026.
label: 6. Supportive Teachers
